name: analysing-har
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for analysing HAR network captures with wiretrail, by John Neerdael

plugins.name: analysing-har
plugins.description: Analyse and debug HAR (HTTP Archive) captures with wiretrail: request storms, wasteful duplicates vs retries, 4xx/5xx errors, slow calls, auth/JWT/token-refresh flows, rate limits, and what differs between repeated calls. Redacts secrets by default. Wraps wiretrail with auto-install instructions.
